description: Record python version, pytorch version, cpu/cuda availability, default dtype/device, torch.save/load existence, torch.nn.Module.load_state_dict existence, torch.load weights_only signature support.
Save/load cpu tensor [[1.0, -2.0], [3.5, 0.25]] float32 via io.BytesIO, torch.load(weights_only=True, map_location='cpu'), verify torch.equal.
Save/load dict {"step": 7, "name": "tiny-checkpoint", "weights": tensor([1.25, -0.5], float32), "shape": [2]} with weights_only=True.
TinyLinear(Linear(3,2)): weight [[1.0,0.0,-1.0],[0.5,2.0,0.25]], bias [0.25,-0.75]. Save state_dict only, load weights_only=True, verify every tensor.
Fresh TinyLinear, load_state_dict, check missing/unexpected keys. Input [[2.0,-1.0,0.5]] inference_mode, verify output equality.
BenignRecord(label='local-only', count=3), no __reduce__. Save to BytesIO, load weights_only=True, expect restricted rejection.
Same BenignRecord, load with explicit weights_only=False on trusted local buffer only. Verify attributes.
Bytes b'not a pytorch checkpoint' in BytesIO, load weights_only=True, map_location='cpu', expect rejection.
Save plain tensor, load with map_location='cpu', weights_only=True, verify device==cpu and equality.
Context-only: verify README/RESULTS disclaim no global safety/quality/architecture/provenance claims.
